name: agent-hollow
description: Agent Hollow: visualize Claude Code sessions as a pixel-art RTS
author: AJ Caylor <ajcaylor@gmail.com>
contributors: Mateusz Pawelczuk (original author of Age of Agents)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-hollow/server" "npm run dev -w @agent-hollow/client"
scripts.demo: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @agent-hollow/server -- --demo" "npm run dev -w @agent-hollow/client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @agent-hollow/server && npm run test -w @agent-hollow/client
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
